title: SARSA
html: Stub. On-policy TD RL algorithm (State-Action-Reward-State-Action). Yahir compared it head-to-head with Q learning in his OSU (2025-06-05): both run with α=0.5, ε ∈ {0.01, 0.95}, 50 trials × 100 episodes, plotting cumulative reward.
